name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with same-day in-store service at their Memphis location.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a short-term lending storefront operation with multiple locations across Memphis, Tennessee. The company has been operating physical retail locations designed to provide quick access to emergency cash for consumers facing immediate financial needs. Their Memphis Summer Avenue location exemplifies their neighborhood-based service model, offering in-person application and funding.

Speedy Cash primarily offers three lending products: payday loans (up to $425 with repayment due around the next paycheck), lines of credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw and repayment), and title loans (up to $4,000 secured by vehicle collateral). All three products are designed for rapid approval and funding. Beyond lending, they provide ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot prepaid card services. Applications can be initiated online but require in-store completion and approval.

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through its emphasis on in-person customer service and convenience. The company positions itself as offering transparent terms upfront before signing, with loan costs communicated clearly prior to agreement. They provide extended weekday hours (some locations open until 7pm) and Saturday availability to accommodate working customers. Their multiple Memphis-area locations allow customers to choose convenient branch access.

However, consumers should recognize that Speedy Cash operates in the high-cost lending space. Payday and title loans typically carry APRs that significantly exceed traditional lending products and may be substantially higher than the 36% threshold associated with more affordable alternatives. While the company emphasizes speed and accessibility, these loans are intended only for genuine emergencies and should not be used for long-term borrowing. Customers should carefully review all terms before applying and consider whether alternative funding sources might be available.
pros: Payday loans available up to $425 with repayment on next paycheck—faster than many alternatives
In-store application process allows customers to ask questions and review documents before signing
Extended hours (until 7pm on Monday and Friday; open Saturday 9am-4pm) accommodate working consumers
Multiple Memphis-area locations (8 listed) provide geographic convenience
Transparent pricing: company states loan costs are communicated before signing loan agreement
Lines of credit up to $4,000 offer flexible draw and repayment structure
Title loans secured by vehicles allow larger loans ($4,000) for qualified borrowers
Additional money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders, prepaid cards) available in-store
cons: High-cost lending: payday and title loans typically carry APRs far exceeding 36%, making them expensive compared to alternatives
Payday loans capped at $425, limiting utility for larger emergency expenses
In-store visit required despite online application option, creating friction and inconvenience
Title loans require vehicle possession during appraisal and clear title documentation, limiting accessibility
No mention of credit reporting impact, default consequences, or loan renewal practices on website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers in Memphis needing immediate cash for genuine emergencies
Borrowers with vehicles and emergency funding needs up to $4,000 who can qualify for title loans
Consumers who prefer in-person interaction and explanation before committing to a loan
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for Memphis-area consumers facing genuine short-term emergencies who need same-day or next-day funding and prefer in-person service with transparent terms. The critical caveat is that these are high-cost loans; APRs typically far exceed affordable lending thresholds, and consumers should exhaust all alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, family loans, non-profit assistance) before using payday or title lending.
services: Title loans up to $4,000 (collateral-based, secured by vehicle)
Green Dot Visa prepaid debit card services
Vehicle appraisal for title loan collateral valuation
